transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Ruff! Welcome to Chef Dog is my co-pilot. How can I get a two cheeseburgers meal with a doctor pepper?
[00:00:09.00] We're going to make donuts right now. And a big Mac meal with also a doctor pepper and one
[00:00:18.84] Mac chicken. We're taking some food to it. We're taking some food to it. We're taking some food to somebody.
[00:00:30.00] We're at a Macdonald's drive-through. We're ordering some food for somebody through an app.
[00:00:39.76] We're taking it to them. It's synchro de Mayo. Well not anymore. It's past midnight.
[00:00:49.18] Just in time.
[00:00:51.24] That's I've been a bit disappointed.
